refnamediv.refpurpose: Remove small connected objects from a 3D volume.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imbwareaopen3(volume, minSize); out = imbwareaopen3(volume, minSize, connectivity)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Labels 3D foreground components and keeps only components meeting the voxel-count threshold.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.
